feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC story Row and column alignment issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

Created story on Responsive page  after adding Required  Dimensions, styles applied on Top Node, Top Node-1

when we try to change Hierarchy or Remove Filters ,  we notice Two issue

1. Extra columns or Rows available which is not Auto Aliened.

2. Styles changes when hier levels changes  which is not   Auto Aliened.

Below image for Ref

entry.title: Nested IF Statement Comparing Versions
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to implement the following logic: Write a "1" to Measure = Mismatch_Indicator for every member in "Site" Dimenstion if sales are above zero in Version = Public.Z AND there are no sales in Version = Public.X. 

The idea is to flag this site.

The only difference on these two versions, is that in version Public.Z, Sales are placed on d/DIM1 = "#" and d/DIM2 = "#". Both are placed on a Site.

I have tried with the following script, however I don't get the desired output.

CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = ON

//SCOPE
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "Mismatch_Indicator"
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/From_Date] TO [d/Version].[p/To_Date]

//DATA WRITING

IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Net_Sales_ext", [d/Version] = "public.Z", [d/DIM1] = "#", [d/DIM2] = "#") > 0 THEN
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Net_Sales_ext", [d/Version] = "public.X") = 0 THEN
DATA([d/Measures] = "Mismatch_Indicator") = 1
ENDIF
ENDIF

entry.title: SAC model replace (zero) with 0
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to replace in SAC in model records containing zero with 0. This works if I select the records in detail using parameters in a popup window. Is there a way to replace all records containing (zero) with 0 for a specific key figure without selecting the parameters per employee? (see Bild 1)

 

I need the “0” so that the average per employee is calculated correctly when changing cost centers.

Without “0”, the average per year per employee is calculated as follows:

I would be happy to hear your suggestions.

Thank You

BR

Marm

entry.title: In SAC System Overview--> Authorization Missing Options
entry.content: In some posting blogs, I see users have option with last 6 months of activities. I do not have the option. All I can see is All, Active, Deactivated and No Log on. Is there something I need to do to have the last 6 months report?

entry.title: OPEX Cost centre allocation - Advanced formula clarification
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I'm reaching out for assistance in understanding a specific piece of code from the IFP cost centre expense plan input form. We have a data action that allocates the cost centre expenses with account grouping(SAP_FI_IFP_IM_OPEX_AllocateCCtrExpensesWithAccountGrouping) , and I’m facing challenges deciphering a highlighted section within the code.

Additionally, I've noted that in the corresponding lookup table, we have 13 different account members linked to 2 different partner cost centres (17101301 and 17101302), resulting in a total of 26 entries (13 * 2).

My specific question is regarding the population of partner cost centre, cost centre, company code, and date dimensions. It seems that other dimensions are appearing as #, and I expected to see only the cost centre and debit credit indicator dimension member values. Can someone help clarify the logic behind this?

I appreciate your help in understanding the nuances of this code.

@hartmut_koerner : Can you please help me in understanding the above code. Thanks for the your valuable time.

entry.title: SAP BDC Trial Version Release
entry.content:
Hi All,

Could you help me determine the release date of the trial version of SAP Business Data Cloud? Clients are requesting a demo, and I’d appreciate any insights.

Thanks!

entry.title: How to allocate for integer measure in SAC
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have an situation where we need to allocate the volumes based on the percentages entered by users.

Volume is an integer measure. When we try with standard allocation, the values are allocated incorrectly.

Please find the example and scenario explained in the screenshots. 

In SAC how do we handle this scenario ? How to do allocation for integer measure ? Anyone have idea to achieve this scenario ?

entry.title: SAC CSS Input Control Properties dont work
entry.content:
Hi,

any idea why these properties if input control class dont work?

.inputcontrol .sap-custom-account-input-control-widget {background-color: #ffffff; }

.inputcontrol .sap-custom-account-input-control-mark-border {border-color: rgb(0,0,0);}

 

BR

Alex

entry.title: Dynamic Visibility of Input Controls in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
In SAP Analytics Cloud, is it possible to dynamically show or hide specific Input Controls based on the values of other filters, such as a slider, switch, or box list?

For example, if a user selects a adjusts a slider to a specific range, can other Input Controls be automatically hidden or displayed accordingly?

Thank you in advance for your assistance and guidance!

entry.title: Authentication to andon with sac
entry.content: Hi, I would like to display SAC BI stories inside an Andon panel, but I can't authenticate. Any suggestions?

entry.title: Time Series (Trend) chart
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am building Time Series (Trend) chart with amount (measure) and date (time dimension) fields in SAC story. We have 598 days of data. When i created forecast through below menu options, the maximum periods that i can forecast for is 5. I understand that i cant forecast more than 5 periods as i have less data. 

More Options/Add/Forecast/Advanced Forecast

But the 'Forecast Quality' shows score 0/5. 0 means lowest confidence forecast score. 

I have applied all types of forecast available options like  

Automatic, Exponential Smoothing, Linear Regression, Advanced Forecast

But always the 'Forecast Quality' shows score 0/5. 

I am using SAP Datasphere analytical model to build this chart in the story. 

0 score doesnt make any sense. what are the prerequisites i am missing in building the Time Series (Trend) chart. 

I searched online but couldnt find anything relevant/valuable that gives in detail explanation on this chart type.

Please help. Thank you.

entry.title: SAC story Report format issue
entry.content:
Hi Team Need your help 

created Report in Responsive and inserted Table  

Issue: we are getting values in Negative as (100) and only negative should display in Red color .

I know we can use Threshold in Chart but Table how can ? can some  one help

entry.title: Dynamic MTD, QTD, YTD for Current and Previous Year in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Story
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a requirement to build a report in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) that displays Month-to-Date (MTD), Quarter-to-Date (QTD), and Year-to-Date (YTD) values for both the current and previous year. The user should be able to select a month, quarter, or year using a drop-down Story input control, and the report should dynamically show the corresponding data for both the current and previous years.

The story is built on top of a Datasphere Analytical Model (AM), and I have created several calculated measures (e.g., Net Sales, COGS). I am also using a date dimension, but currently, I need to manually select dates from both the current and previous years. Additionally, the date dimension is displayed in a hierarchy format, which requires drilling down after selecting a quarter or month, and this results in extra columns that make the report cluttered.

Is there a way to automatically fetch the previous year's data when the user selects a date for the current year, so I can avoid selecting dates for both years and eliminate the extra columns and the need to drill down?

Any suggestions or best practices for implementing this would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Issue with Updating Columns and Hierarchies in SAC Story from Datasphere Analytical Model
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve created a story in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) based on an Analytical Model (AM) in Datasphere. Initially, the model had 10 columns and 2 hierarchies (created using associations). Later, I added a new column and hierarchy (added new association) to the model, but these updates are not reflected in the SAC story.

As a temporary solution, I created a new AM and built a new story, but this doesn’t seem like a sustainable option in the long run, especially when frequent updates to the model are required.

Is this a known limitation of the Analytical Model, or is there a more efficient way to ensure that updates to the AM are automatically reflected in the SAC story without needing to recreate everything from scratch?

Any advice or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

entry.title: Script to Control Measure in SAP Analytics Cloud Table Using Range Slide
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on an analytic application in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using SAP BW live data. I want to control a measure in a table using a range slider with scripting. Specifically, I need to filter the measure dynamically based on the range slider's values. I have a range slider component (RangeSlider_1) and a table component (Table_1) that displays SAP BW data. Is it possible to accomplish this with scripting?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAC - currency conversion across three currencies
entry.content:
Hi community,

lets say I have currency conversion rates with many source currencies  (eg USD, GBP) and one target currency (EUR). And now I would like to convert USD to GBP. In the conversion table, I dont have the conversion rate between these two currencies, but it could be calculated, as we have the rates for USD to EUR as well as GBP to EUR.

In SAP Learning, I have found this information: "However, rates won't be automatically combined to perform indirect conversion across three or more currencies (for example, first CAD to EUR, and then EUR to USD)."

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/9348d55977e94994ab27bf031389d8f2.html?locale=en-US

Maybe there is a known workaround (within SAC)?

Will this functionality be added to SAC in the future?

Kind regards,

Eric

entry.title: Limit a YTD calculation in a column chart to a certain month
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have the following problem: I want to create a column chart that shows the YTD value per month for the current year. The chart also includes the PY YTD value for comparison.
Unfortunately, the YTD value up to the current month is also displayed in months where no data is available. For example, if data is available only until July, the chart correctly shows a gradual increase until July. However, after July, the value remains the same instead of disappearing.
I would prefer that no value is displayed instead of the last available value being carried forward. The following picture illustrates this issue: the triangle represents the PY YTD value, while the column represents the current year's YTD value.

I know that if you only have the YTD value for the current year, you can adjust the chart to display only the months up to the selected filter. However, since I also have the PY YTD value, the chart already shows all months.

Therefore, my question is: Is there a way to also limit the PY YTD in the same way as the current year YTD, so that the chart only displays the months up to the currently filtered month?
Or—even better—is there a solution where all months remain visible, but the current year YTD is only displayed up to the currently filtered month?

Thanks in advance and have a nice day!

entry.title: SAC Story date Issue
entry.content:
Hi All

In our Sac Story Implementation,  we are using Two Input controls Date and company code 

In Report Table : we are  populating data for opening balance based on the date input control is it possible to populate January data for same Year  using any Calculated dimension or Measures 

Below image for Ref

entry.title: DATA([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/gl_account] = "RevToVolumsap analytics cloud advanced formula issue
entry.content:
Hi 

Sorry , by mistake I deleted script, reposting the same. Here Third data point not getting calculated. 

DATA([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/gl_account] = "RevToVolume", [d/data_src] = "calc") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/data_src] = "Input", [d/gl_account] = "RevToVolume", [d/product_grp] = "#", [d/product] = "#", [d/profit_center] = "#", [d/posting_month] = "000000")
DATA([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/gl_account] = "TPV", [d/data_src] = "calc") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/gl_account]="TPV",[d/data_src]= "fba")
DATA([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/gl_account] = "TTR_STAT", [d/data_src] = "calc") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="Amount", [d/gl_account]="TPV",[d/data_src]= "calc") * RESULTLOOKUP( [d/Measures]="Amount", [d/gl_account] = "RevToVolume", [d/data_src] = "calc")

 

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud compatibility with SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Is there any feature support matrix for SAP Analytics Cloud functionality for Datasphere (direct consume for analytics model)?

We have done few testing and found that nice feature such Compass, Predictive Scenario, In chart time series forecast and smart insight is not working.

Thanks for all help.
